stories.headline: Trump Revels in Threats to Commit War Crimes in Iran
stories.summary: The president said he would bomb Iran “back to the Stone Ages.” Until this administration, American leaders had insisted they were trying to follow international law in war.

stories.headline: US Rescues Missing Airman as Iran Strikes Gulf Arab States

stories.headline: US Successfully Rescues Second Airman from Iran
stories.summary: Breaking News on Bloomberg This Weekend - there has been a successful rescue of a second US airman from Iran. Bloomberg's White House correspondent Jeff Mason and Bloomberg's Jerusalem reporter Dan Williams join hosts Christina Ruffini and Joe Mathieu and provide insight on the context and on going situation in Iran. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: U.S. Rescues Missing Air Force Officer Whose Fighter Jet Was Downed by Iran
stories.summary: An Air Force officer of a F-15E Strike Eagle shot down on Friday by Iran spent a day in hostile territory with little more than a pistol for protection.

stories.headline: Zelenskyy warns US-Iran war could divert critical aid from Ukraine
stories.summary: President Zelenskyy has warned that a prolonged US-Israeli war with Iran is threatening the supply of vital Patriot missiles and boosting Russia’s economy through surging oil prices.

stories.headline: OPEC+ agrees to hike oil output, warns of slow recovery after attacks
stories.summary: The rise is largely symbolic as some key members are unable to raise ​production amid the US-Israel war on Iran.

stories.headline: Ukraine and Syria to cooperate on security, Zelenskyy says
stories.summary: During a trip to Damascus, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said the two countries agreed to work together.

stories.headline: Israeli air strike hits crowd in Gaza City
stories.summary: Several Palestinians were rushed to hospital with severe injuries after an Israeli air strike hit a crowd in Gaza City.

stories.headline: Israel continues deadly attacks on Gaza while striking Iran, Lebanon

stories.headline: OPEC+ Plans Symbolic Oil Quota Hike for May
stories.summary: Bloomberg News Equities Reporter Natalia Kniazhevich joins Joe Mathieu and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the latest impact the war in Iran is having on the energy markets. Watch the show LIVE every Saturday and Sunday morning. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: In first Easter blessing as pontiff, Pope Leo XIV urges those who can unleash wars to 'choose peace'
stories.summary: In his first Easter blessing, Pope Leo XIV urged "those who have the power to unleash wars" to "choose peace" as Christians around the world celebrate Easter Sunday.

stories.headline: Cambodia unveils statue to honour famous landmine-sniffing rat
stories.summary: The statue honours the late African giant pouched rat who sniffed out more than 100 landmines during his lifetime.

stories.headline: How China fell for a lobster: What an AI assistant tells us about Beijing's ambition

stories.summary: The architect of President Trump’s mass deportation campaign wants “a moratorium on immigration from third world countries until we can heal ourselves as a nation.” The chaos in Minneapolis has not pushed him off that course.

stories.summary: Exclusive: Animal welfare charities ‘bitterly disappointed’ UK government plans to backtrack on manifesto promisesThis article contains an image of a duck being force-fed that some readers may find upsettingThe UK government is to break a manifesto commitment to ban foie gras imports, and has declined to stop fur imports, after the EU made these red lines in its discussions for a trade deal.Animal welfare charities say they are “bitterly disappoi

stories.headline: UK police arrest seven protesters near RAF base used by US
stories.summary: The activists were protesting the alleged use of the RAF base as a departure point for US aircraft.

stories.headline: State medical insurance reform aims to expand access to healthcare
stories.summary: The reform will introduce digital referrals, a national health insurance fund and a guaranteed package of medical services funded through the state budget. Officials say the changes aim to improve efficiency, expand access and reduce informal payments.

stories.headline: Explosives found near gas pipeline connecting Serbia and Hungary, Vučić says
stories.summary: Serbian president Aleksandar Vučić has said that explosives were found by police near a pipeline that carries gas from Russia to Serbia and Hungary, but did not elaborate on potential suspects or their motives.

stories.headline: Help or hinderance? Amateur archaeologist digs at German castle ruins without permission
stories.summary: Germany's cultural heritage community is embroiled in a row after an amateur archaeologist uncovered an ancient construction. The problem however is that he didn't have permission to dig at the site of Metilstein Castle near Eisenach.

stories.headline: Leipzig Eierlei festival celebrates the 'eggstraordinary' art of Easter decorations
stories.summary: For some painting eggs is an integral part of Easter, but exhibitors at the Eierlei Festival in Leipzig take this tradition to a new level as craft and art experts show what can be done with supposedly "simple" decorations.

stories.headline: Why do Catholics and Orthodox celebrate Easter on different dates?
stories.summary: To understand why Catholic and Orthodox Christians celebrate Easters on different dates you have to go back more than 400 years, to ten days that didn't exist...

stories.summary: Is rebirth on your mind this Easter? Human composting turns your body into ‘beautiful, stunning’ soil when you die.

stories.headline: New Attorney General, Same Albatross: Trump’s Quest for Retribution
stories.summary: The name atop the Justice Department’s organizational chart matters less than the presence of a president whose demands for revenge have become so extreme that even his most obsequious appointees have fallen short.

stories.headline: A Meat Plant Closed in Nebraska. Then Politics Became a Focus for These Latinos
stories.summary: Politically disconnected young men, especially Latinos, helped fuel President Trump’s victory, but in this economy, they could move to unconventional candidates like Dan Osborn in Nebraska.

stories.headline: Foreign Doctors Forced Out of U.S. Hospitals by Trump Immigration Policy
stories.summary: Physicians from 39 countries are being pushed out of U.S. hospitals as a policy blocks their ability to work.

stories.headline: Poland's border with Belarus sees decrease in illegal immigration attempts by 96%

stories.summary: The focus of the talks of Italian prime minister with Qatar, the Emirates and Saudi Arabia was the restoration of energy supplies and security in Hormuz. Italy offered technical support for affected infrastructure and defence against Iranian raids.

Its epicentre was 127km (79 miles) west-north-west of Ternate, an

stories.headline: Asia's migrant workers debate if Gulf jobs are worth deadly risk of Iran war

stories.headline: Weather tracker: Thunderstorms drench UAE and Saudi Arabia
stories.summary: Abnormally strong jet stream triggers deluge in Middle East, while north Africa braces for 60-80mph gustsAn unusual weather pattern unleashed severe thunderstorms across parts of the Middle East last week, battering countries including the United Arab Emirates and Saudi Arabia.
